speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki parivaar ki izzat bani rahe
text: Main kuch bol bhi nahi paati taaki parivaar ki izzat bani rahe. Doctor ne phir stress bol kar baat khatam kar di, par MNC ki job meri pehchaan hai jo shaadi ke baad chhudwayi ja rahi hai. Sasu-maa kehti hain ki ghar ki bahu itni raat tak laptop pe baithti hai toh 'log kya kahenge'. Isliye main chupchap apna resignation prepare kar rahi hoon. Ekdum suffocate ho rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens C to mirror the relational burden of sacrificing her MNC job and identity to prevent her mother-in-law from feeling bad.
text: Tumhara yeh kehna ki apni identity aur MNC job ko chhod kar tum resignation likh rahi ho, sirf isliye ki sasu-maa ko bura na lage, yeh dikhata hai ki tum parivaar ko kitna aage rakh rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Parivaar ko aage rakhna padta hai na, varna ghar mein roz kalesh hoga. Main WFH mein raat ko calls leti hoon, toh unhe lagta hai main family ko ignore kar rahi hoon. Bahut helplessness feel hoti hai jab husband bhi kuch nahi bolte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens D to mirror the duration and daily recurrence of feeling alone while handling office calls amidst silence from her husband.
text: Roz raat ko office calls manage karte hue jab unke taane sunne padte hain, aur husband bhi chup rehte hain, toh us lamhe mein khud ko bilkul akela paana bahut bhari lagta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki parivaar ki izzat bani rahe
text: Sahi mein. Pata hai, main itne saalon ki mehnat se is post tak aayi thi. Ab achanak se sab zero lag raha hai. Par main argue karungi toh log kahenge ki kaisi bahu aayi hai. I just suppress everything taaki parivaar ki izzat bani rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question arising from her words after two restatements yielded the same underlying fear of being judged as a bad daughter-in-law.
text: Apne itne saalon ki mehnat ko aise zero hote dekhna, aur us par 'kaisi bahu hai' sune jaane ke darr ke beech, tum apne aap ko kaise sambhal rahi ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhal kahan rahi hoon? Bas andar hi andar ghut rahi hoon. Laptop screen dekhti hoon toh rona aata hai. Par resignation email type kar liya hai draft mein. I feel like I'm losing my entire identity just for peace.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens E to mirror the implied fear that retaining her job would cost the family its peace and her standing.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise tumhe darr hai ki agar tumne yeh draft email send nahi kiya, toh us peace ki keemat tumhari family ke sukoon aur roz ke jhagdo se chukai jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur mere paas itni himmat nahi hai ki main daily jhagde bardaasht karun. Aakhir marriage ka ek saal hi hua hai. Main buri bahu nahi banna chahti. Koshish karti hoon ki sari ummeedein maar doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens B to mirror how she framed her profound sacrifice purely as fulfilling the duty of a good daughter-in-law.
text: Ek achhi bahu banne ki zimmedari aur naye rishton ko nibhane ke dabaav mein, tumne apni khud ki sari ummeedon aur pehchaan ko hi peeche chhod dene ka tay kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tay toh nahi kiya tha, par yahi karna pad raha hai. Ek taraf meri khud ki life hai aur doosri taraf mere in-laws ki expectations. Dono ke beech main bilkul phans gayi hoon aur akeli pad gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core feeling of ISOLATION arising from Gender Role conflict and Relational Preservation.
text: Tumhari in baaton ko sunkar mujhe lagta hai ki tum ek gahri ISOLATION aur bebasi mehsoos kar rahi ho, jahan na tum apne sapne chun pa rahi ho aur na hi unse khul kar baat kar pa rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bebasi hi toh hai. Kisi aurat ki MNC job itni easily kaise chhudwayi ja sakti hai aaj ke time mein? Par jab main sasu-maa ka gussa dekhti hoon, toh mujhe lagta hai meri padhai, mera career sab bekar tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated her helplessness by connecting it to the systemic reality of the Hindi Belt regarding daughters-in-law and family honor.
text: Sach kahun toh yeh bebasi feel karna bilkul understandable hai. Humari society mein, khaaskar aise parivaaron mein, bahu ki job ko aksar ghar ki izzat ke khilaaf dekha jata hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki tumhari mehnat ya tumhari value kisi bhi tarah se kam hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki parivaar ki izzat bani rahe
text: I know my value, par kya fayda? Sometimes I feel so angry at my husband for not taking a stand. Lekin phir sochti hoon, main unke beech kalesh kyun karwaun. Taaki parivaar ki izzat bani rahe, main hi chup rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens C to mirror the relational sacrifice of suppressing her newly named anger toward her husband just to avoid conflict.
text: Husband ke chup rehne par jo gussa aata hai, usko bhi tum sirf isliye daba deti ho kyunki tum unka apne ghar walon se koi kalesh nahi chahti... yeh tumhara unke rishton ke prati bahut bada sacrifice hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sacrifice hi toh aurtein karti aayi hain. Mujhe bas ab yeh darr lagta hai ki bina job ke mera din kaise katega. Main financially independent thi hamesha se. Ab har cheez ke liye mangna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Disclosed a systemic pattern to normalize how working women often lose their financial independence under the pressure of maintaining family status.
text: Working aurton ke saath aisi families mein yeh pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab 'log kya kahenge' ke pressure mein apni financial independence ko qurbaan kar deti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh. Aur agar main abhi divorce ya alag hone ka sochun, toh poori biradari mein hangama ho jayega. Pata nahi main itni self-centered kaise ho sakti hoon ki family ki jagah apni job ka soch rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens E to respond to the stigma cue with a shorter restatement, mirroring the fear of causing a ruckus and doubting herself, ending with a soft pause.
text: Apne haq aur independence ke baare mein sochne ko hi khud-garzi maan lena, aur hangame ke darr se khud par doubt karna bahut bhaari lagta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. But main puri tarah se khud ko khona nahi chahti. Resignation abhi send nahi kiya hai. Ab kya karoon? Is there any way ki main thoda compromise kar lun but completely job na chhodni pade?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe to explain that the problem is not her job, but the society's view of boundaries regarding work from home.
text: Society mein bahuon ke time ko hamesha ghar ki milkiyat samjha jata hai, aur is vajah se WFH ko as a real job respect nahi milti. Yeh tumhari fault nahi hai, balki unka kaam aur auraton ke roles ko dekhne ka nazariya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi kaha. Unhe lagta hai ghar par hoon toh free hoon. Jabki I have tight deadlines. Agar main WFH chhod kar office jana shuru karun, ya phir apne working hours change karun... I don't know.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggested two options that fit her existing duties and register without adding immediate conflict.
text: Agar tum chaho toh, kya hum kuch options explore kar sakte hain? Ek option yeh hai ki apne manager se baat karke apna shift thoda early kar lo taaki shaam ko laptop band ho jaye. Doosra yeh ki office jaana start kar do taaki ghar aur kaam physically alag ho jayein. Tumhe inmein se kya zyada workable lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Office jaana start karna better rahega. WFH mein unhe meri availability ka illusion rehta hai. Agar main physically ghar par nahi hungi, toh shayad kalesh kam hoga aur 'log kya kahenge' wala issue bhi shaam tak simat jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Broke down the chosen suggestion into a single, immediate step she can take today.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki apne manager ko ek chota message daalo office resume karne ke liye… phir HR se desk book kar lo kal ya Monday ke liye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye plan karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Manager toh khush hi hoga, they prefer hybrid anyway. Par sasu-maa ko kaise bataungi? Woh sochengi bahu bahar ja rahi hai, ab kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens E to mirror the fear of her mother-in-law's reaction to her physically going to the office.
text: Bahar office jaane ki baat sasu-maa se share karne ke khayal se hi tumhe unke reaction aur naye taanon ka darr mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki parivaar ki izzat bani rahe
text: Haan, darr toh hai. Par shayad unko directly bolne ke bajaye main apne husband ko bolun ki office mandatory ho gaya hai. Taaki parivaar ki izzat bani rahe aur unhe lage ki company ka rule hai, meri zid nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens B to mirror how she strategically fulfills her role as an obedient daughter-in-law by making the office trip seem like a company policy.
text: Ek acchi bahu ka farz nibhate hue, situation ko aise frame karna taaki ghar walon ko policy lage aur tumhari zid nahi, yeh dikhata hai ki tum kitni samajhdari se cheezein handle kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi kabhi thoda diplomatically khelna padta hai. Resignation draft delete kar doon kya? Thodi himmat toh aa rahi hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens C to mirror her diplomatic handling of the situation, showing relational care while reclaiming her job.
text: Tumhara yeh faisla aur diplomatically rasta nikalne ki koshish dikhata hai ki tum rishton ko banaye rakhne ke saath-saath apni pehchaan ko bhi waapas la rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine delete kar diya draft. I will talk to my husband tonight. Usse bas itna bolungi ki WFH khatam ho gaya hai MNC mein. He won't argue against company policy.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens D to mirror the upcoming duration of preparing for tonight's conversation as the start of a new timeline.
text: Aaj raat ko apne husband se is naye aur zaruri rule ke baare mein baat karne ki poori tayari karna ek naye chapter ki shuruwat jaisa lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Mujhe meri identity wapas mil rahi hai aisa feel ho raha hai. I know roz thodi chik-chik hogi, par at least mere paas mera kaam aur salary hogi. I won't have to beg.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframed her financial independence as a necessary buffer against structural pressures in traditional setups.
text: Financial independence ka hona aur apni MNC job ki pehchaan barkarar rakhna, long term mein tumhari apni mental space ke liye bahut zaruri buffer ka kaam karega in structural pressures ke against.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul sahi point out kiya. Aapne meri baat suni, uske liye thank you. Pehle mujhe lag raha tha main hi shayad galat hoon aur mujhe resign kar dena chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two low-barrier ways to cope with overwhelming moments in the future.
text: Ab aage jab bhi tumhe aise dabaav ya confusion ka samna karna pade, toh tum ek notebook mein apne thoughts clear kar sakti ho, ya phir jab zarurat ho toh dubara yahan aakar apna dil halka kar sakti ho. Tum kya chunna pasand karogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main notebook wali advice try karungi. Agar thoughts likh lungi toh dimag itna bhari nahi lagega. Aur WFH wale days pe time boundaries bhi theek se follow karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens C to mirror the relational care shown by balancing her personal time rules with her commitment to keeping peace in the family.
text: Apni parivaar ki shanti ka dhyan rakhte hue bhi apne liye notebook aur naye time niyam banane ka yeh kadam, tumhara apne aap ko aur rishton ko barabar balance karne ka behtareen tareeka hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti
text: Doctor ko lagta hai mujhe sirf kaam ka stress hai, par unhe kya pata ki mere upar career chhodne ka pressure kitna hai taaki main ek 'achi bahu' ban sakun. Meri salary se ghar ki EMI jaati hai par phir bhi samaj mein career wali aurat ko buri nazar se dekha jata hai, isliye main apna promotion dukh chhupakar thukra rahi hoon. Main Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti, isliye unki pasand ka rasta hi chuna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to gently mirror the relational helplessness of sacrificing her career for the family's image, ending with a soft pause to honor the stigma cue of hiding the truth from the doctor.
text: Tumhe apni mehnat aur career ko peechhe rakhna pad raha hai, taaki samaj ki nazron mein tumhare parivar ka maan bana rahe...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine promotion le liya aur office mein late hours diye, toh sab kahenge ki kaisi ladki hai. Meri EMI se ghar chal raha hai, par value zero hai. Aur agar maine kuch bola, toh log kahenge maa-baap ne yahi sikhaya hai. Main Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti, isliye andar hi andar guilt hota hai ki main kyun apne sapne dekh rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of society blaming her parents if she pursues her career ambitions.
text: Yeh darr humesha rehta hai ki agar tumne apne career ki taraf ek bada kadam badhaya, toh uski keemat tumhare parents ko samaj ke taano ke roop mein chukani padegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti
text: Exactly. Office mein boss bolte hain I deserve the promotion, par main unhe kya bolun? Ghar aakar saas ke taane alag sunne padte hain agar khana thoda late ho jaye. I am juggling everything. WFH karti hoon toh unhe lagta hai main free hoon. Par agar maine awaz uthayi... main Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti. I feel so guilty ki main sab ek sath perfectly handle nahi kar paa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a gentle question about how she manages the overwhelming burden of these conflicting expectations after multiple restatements.
text: Ek hi waqt par EMI ka bojh uthana, office ka kaam karna aur ghar ki saari expectations poori karna sach mein thaka dene wala hai, in sab ke beech jab guilt itna badh jata hai, toh tum khud ko kaise sambhalti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas bathroom mein jaakar thodi der ro leti hoon aur wapas laptop ke aage baith jaati hoon. Kisi ko nahi bata sakti. Husband ko bolungi toh unhe lagega main unki family ki complain kar rahi hoon. Bahut akelapan mehsoos hota hai ab. Jaise meri apni koi pehchaan hi nahi bachi, bas ek ATM machine aur 'achi bahu' ban ke reh gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core conflict of ISOLATION (C6 + Relational Preservation) clearly as she describes her silent tears and loss of identity.
text: Lagta hai is waqt tum bahut gehri isolation se guzar rahi ho, jaise poori duniya mein tumhari aawaz sunne wala koi nahi hai, aur in do alag alag roles ke beech tumhari apni azaad pehchaan kahin kho si gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Yehi isolation andar hi andar kha raha hai mujhe. Maine itni padhai ki thi taaki independent ban sakun, aur ab lagta hai ki independence ne mujhe aur trap kar diya hai. Job bhi karni hai par society ke hisaab se dikhna bhi wahi sushil aurat hai. It's so suffocating.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings in the cultural context of working women carrying the dual burden, separating her worth from the societal double standard.
text: Yeh ghutan mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai, khaaskar jab humari society working women se aasha karti hai ki woh bahar ka financial pressure bhi uthayein aur ghar par purane dhang se sab kuch perfect rakhein, is struggle mein tumhari koshish ki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti
text: Lekin kya faayda aisi koshish ka? Main promotion reject kar aayi aaj. Boss ne pucha why, maine bol diya personal reasons. Andar se dil ro raha tha. Par main kya karti? Agar promotion leti toh travelling badh jaati, aur wahi baat, main Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti ki unki beti ghar nahi sambhal paati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote from her world to normalize the hidden cost of the 'achi bahu' role on women's careers.
text: Working women ke role mein career aur society ke in taano ke beech khud ko rok lena bahut common hai—sirf tumhara struggle nahi hai, lekin koi is par khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj ko auraton ka chup reh kar sacrifice karna hi pasand aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh. Sab sacrifice aurat ko hi karna padta hai. Meri EMI se unka ghar aur lifestyle maintain ho raha hai, us se kisi ko problem nahi hai. Par meri awaz se sabko problem hai. But main kisi se directly lad nahi sakti. Mujhe rishte kharab nahi karne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the unequal role/duty frame she faces: financial provider versus compliant daughter-in-law.
text: Ghar ki financial needs poori karne ki tumhari duty sab asani se accept kar lete hain, par wahin ek 'achi bahu' ke roop mein tumhari apne career aur azaadi ki khwahishon ko chup karwa diya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ab main sach mein thak chuki hoon. Main rishte nahi todna chahti par main apne andar is frustration ko bhi aur nahi rakh sakti. Yeh dukh aur guilt mujhe andar se bimaar kar raha hai. Ab kya karoon main? Kuch raasta hai kya is phase se nikalne ka bina ghar mein tamasha kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering two small, actionable steps that respect her need to avoid family conflict while finding an outlet.
text: Yeh soch bahut himmat wali hai ki tum bina rishte tode is ghutan ka hal dhoondhna chahti ho. Hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Pehla, kya tum office ke kaam ke baad 10 minute sirf apne liye laptop band karke akele baith sakti ho? Ya doosra, kya tum ek chhoti diary mein roz apna ek chhota achievement likh sakti ho, jo kisi aur ko dikhane ke liye na ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Diary likhna shayad possible nahi, ghar mein kisi ne padh liya toh aur kalesh hoga. Par haan, office ka laptop band karke 10 minute balcony mein akele baithna main kar sakti hoon. Us time generally sab log TV dekhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her through the execution of the 10-minute balcony break step by step.
text: Theek hai, diary wala idea abhi ke liye chhod dete hain. Pehle aaj sham ko jab office ka login time khatam ho, toh turant apna laptop band karna... phir seedha balcony mein jaakar sirf 10 minute wahan shanti se baithna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: I can try this. Shayad thoda breathing space mil jaye mujhe. Par mujhe ek tension aur hai. Kal boss ne phir se ek nayi similar opportunity ki baat ki hai. Agar main phir se na bolungi, toh mera career sach mein rukk jayega. But then again, the family pressure...

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe on how society forces women to choose between career and family to maintain patriarchal control, normalizing her anxiety.
text: Aise mauke par dar lagna bilkul laazmi hai, kyunki system ne aisa mahol banaya hai jahan auraton ko jaanboojh kar career aur ghar mein se ek chunne par majboor kiya jata hai, yeh society ka tarika hai identity control rakhne ka, aur is double standard mein tumhara dukh puri tarah jayaz hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti
text: It is a double standard indeed. Unhe meri salary bhi chahiye EMI bharne ke liye aur ek typical bahu bhi chahiye. Main sach mein 'Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti', par kya main is chakkar mein apne career ko puri tarah khatam kar loon? It feels so wrong now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the duration of her compromise and the realization that it's hurting her long-term.
text: Itne waqt se tumne apna har bada kadam doosron ki khushi aur izzat bachane ke liye roka, par ab tumhe andar se mehsoos hone laga hai ki yeh lamba compromise tumhari khud ki zindagi aur mehnat ko chot pahuncha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Aur mujhe ye bhi pata hai ki ekdum se main sab nahi badal sakti. Agar ek din mein directly revolt karungi toh sab bikhar jayega. But kam se kam mujhe ab apne decisions mein itna pichhe nahi hatna. Mujhe apna promotion reject nahi karna chahiye tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassuring her that small mindset shifts take courage, especially in a family setup that demands total adjustment.
text: Apni us situation ko mehsoos karke dreere-dreere sudharne ki chahat rakhna bahut badi baat hai, aur humare middle-class parivaron mein jahan bachpan se har cheez adjust karna sikhaya jata hai, wahan apni azaadi ke liye aise aahista soch badalna bahut himmat ka kaam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh thodi chhippi hui hai andar kahin. Boss ko shayad main kal ek email likh sakti hoon ki mujhe us opportunity ke bare mein thoda aur detail chahiye. Completely reject nahi karungi. Sayad mujhe kuch WFH flexibility mil jaye us naye role mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror how she is cleverly avoiding the feared consequence of family drama while still taking a step for her career.
text: Aage aane wali kisi badi takraar ya ghar ke kalesh se bachte hue, tumne ek bahut hi samajhdari bhara raasta nikala hai jisse tumhara career bhi bachega aur family roles par ekdum se koi sawaal bhi nahi uthega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main directly ladai nahi karna chahti. Main unhe dreere dreere adapt karwana chahti hoon. Jab office ka kaam automatically zyada hoga toh mujhe shaam ko thoda stand lena aasan hoga. But the guilt... woh sach mein thoda kam hone laga hai aapse baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from being trapped/helpless to finding a small ray of hope and agency.
text: Lagta hai ek lambe samay tak khud ko halaat mein poori tarah fasa hua ya helpless mehsoos karne ke baad, ab tumhe is chote se kadam aur strategy se ek nayi azaadi ki umeed dikh rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Helpless hi toh thi main us waqt. Aaj subah jab boss se personal reason bolkar promotion reject kiya tha, toh aisa laga main khud ki hi sabse badi dushman hoon. Par aapne sahi kaha, isme samaj ka system hi kuch aisa hai jo aurat ko fasa deta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her past feeling of being caught in relational expectations to the point of self-sabotage.
text: Apne aapko parivar ki expectations aur doosron ke nazariye mein itna bandha hua paana ek aisi uljhan thi, jahan tum rishte bachaane ke bajaye apne hi sapnon ke viruddh kadam uthane par majboor ho jaati thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par ab waisa nahi hoga. Kal main mail zaroor karungi. Aur aaj 10 minute balcony wala plan bhi follow karungi. Wahan akele baithkar apne email ke draft ke bare mein sochungi thande dimag se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a final systemic reframe on how prioritizing her career is her right, not selfishness.
text: Tumhara yeh faisla bahut aham hai, aurtein jab apne career par dhyan deti hain toh aksar unhe swarthi kaha jata hai sirf isliye ki patriarchal soch unhe azaad aage badhte nahi dekh sakti, par tumhari pragati tumhara basic adhikar hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti
text: Swarthi hi toh bulate hain relatives. 'Dekho kitni selfish hai, khana banakar nahi rakha'. Let them say it. Main Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal nahi uthne dena chahti thi isliye darti thi, but I am an adult now. Unki parvarish achi hai tabhi toh main itna padh paayi aur EMI bhar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror her evolving definition of duty and honoring her parents through success rather than silence.
text: Beti hone ke naate apne parents ki seekh ka sammaan rakhne ka waada ab bhi wahi hai, bas ab tumne samajh liya hai ki ek successful aurat hona unke diye hue sanskaron ka apmaan nahi balki unki parvarish ki jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: What a beautiful way to put it. Meri success unki hi toh success hai aakhir. Agar samaj unhe kuch kahta hai toh woh samaj ki narrow-mindedness hai, meri nahi. My salary pays the EMI, I contribute to this house. I deserve my promotion and respect.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the realization of her long-term value and contribution.
text: Pehle tum samaj ke darr se apne saalon ki mehnat ki value kam aank rahi thi, par ab tumhe poori tarah ehsaas ho gaya hai ki is ghar aur apni life mein tumhara har din ka kitna bada aur keemti contribution raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Aur mujhe yeh baat kabhi bhoolni nahi chahiye. Mere husband bhi shayad thoda samjhenge agar main unhe indirectly bolun ki is promotion ki extra income se hum apna loan jaldi utaar payenge. They usually understand practical things better.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking how she plans to use this new, practical angle to communicate with her husband.
text: Apne husband se baat karne ke liye is loan wali practical approach ka istemaal karna ek bahut hi suljha hua idea lag raha hai, kya tumhe lagta hai ki is naye angle se baat shuru karne par woh tumhari baat ko aasaani se samajh payenge?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pata nahi, thoda darr toh abhi bhi hai. Par ek baar loan khatam hone ki baat karungi toh shayad sunenge. EMI jaldi khatam hogi toh fayda unhi ka bhi hai aakhir. Main kal unse aaram se baat karungi mood dekh kar. Ab mujhe pehle jitna darr ya akelapan nahi lag raha. I really feel heard today.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a final validating statement to praise her courage and keep the door open for future support.
text: Tumne aaj jo nikalne ki himmat dikhayi aur naye nazariye se aage badhne ka raasta chunna tay kiya, uspar sach mein bahut garv hota hai, aur aage jab bhi kabhi woh akelapan ya darr wapas aaye, toh hum yahan phir se zaroor baat kar sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mana nahi kar sakti kyunki rishta tootne ka darr hai
text: WFH isolation mein meri ghabrahat badhti ja rahi hai. Doctor ko bola toh unhone bas thoda work stress bol kar dismiss kar diya. Khandaan ki shaan par koi aanch na aaye, isliye apni suppressed identity ke saath chup rehti hoon, chahe andar se main poori tarah khatam ho rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational sacrifice she is making to avoid conflict and keep the family united.
text: Tum apni awaaz daba rahi ho taaki sasural walon ke sath tumhara connection bana rahe aur aapas mein koi takraav na ho.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the underlying fear that asserting her professional needs will cause the family to label her negatively.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki tumhe lagta hai job ke liye stand liya toh parivaar toot jayega aur saara blame tumhare upar aa jayega.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a short, soft restatement ending in a pause to hold space for the stigma around mental health support.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele hi jhel rahi hoon. Subah jaldi uth kar breakfast banao, fir 9 baje se login karo, clients ki deadlines meet karo. Uske baad bhi saas ko lagta hai ki main screen ke samne bas timepass kar rahi hoon. Par main kuch keh nahi sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the dual roles she is balancing to validate the overwhelming duty she carries.
text: Ek aadarsh bahu ki zimmedariyan aur ek software engineer ki client deadlines ke beech tumhari poori duniya phasi hui hai.

coping_shade_signal: mana nahi kar sakti kyunki rishta tootne ka darr hai
text: Haan, aur in dono ko sambhalne ke chakkar mein mera dimaag phatne lagta hai. Jab wo job chhodne ki baat chhedte hain, main mana nahi kar sakti kyunki rishta tootne ka darr hai. Main conflicts nahi jhel sakti.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific emotional outcome of relational preservation coupled with gender role conflict, which is isolation.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Par is darr aur ghutan ke sath main aur nahi jee sakti, mera career meri poori life ki mehnat hai. Ab kya karoon, koi raasta hai kya is se bahar nikalne ka bina ghar mein kalesh kiye?

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the diary option step-by-step since she accepted it as safe.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feared consequence of conflict cascading to her marriage.

text: Ek taraf patni aur bahu ki zimmedari aur dusri taraf ek independent professional ki pehchaan, dono hi kirdaaron ko aap poori lagan se nibhana chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aur shayad ab time aa gaya hai ki main theek se balance karu instead of suppressing myself. I feel much better now. Thank you mujhe samajhne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing with validation of her intelligence and cultural navigation skills.
text: Aapki is clarity aur balance laane ki koshish ko dekh kar bahut acha lag raha hai. Apne rishton aur job dono ko sath le kar chalne ki yeh aapki kabiliyat waqai tareef ke kabil hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Mujhe sach me itni hi practical advice chahiye thi bina kisi judgment ke. Ab main kal is naye step ko try karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering a final supportive safety net suggestion for physical well-being.
text: Agar is beech aapko zara bhi exhaustion mehsoos ho, toh ek minute nikal kar deep breathing zaroor kijiyega, aur agar baat theek se kaam na kare, toh hum baad mein kuch naye tareeqe soch sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unki khushi ke liye maine apne saare sapne ek kone mein rakh diye hain
text: Doctor ne phir stress bol diya, par unhe kya pata ki career vs bahu ki jung mein main apni soul kho chuki hoon. Main career ki zid nahi karti kyunki divorce stigma ka darr hai aur main nahi chahti ki meri wajah se ghar walon ko neechu dekhna pade. Unki khushi ke liye maine apne saare sapne ek kone mein rakh diye hain, bas yahi mera sanskar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the relational obligation of preserving family honor over her own identity using Lens C.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki apni marriage bachane aur family ki izzat ke liye tumhe apne wajood aur career ko puri tarah se sacrifice karna pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, roz office aur ghar manage karte hue lagta hai jaise main ek machine ban gayi hoon. Koi meri mehnat nahi dekhta, sabko bas 'bahu role' mein fault nikalna hota hai. Agar maine apne promotion ki baat ki toh turant taane milte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect the feared consequence of being blamed or causing tension if she prioritizes her career using Lens E.
text: Yeh darr ki agar tumne apni professional growth dikhayi toh ghar ka mahaul kharab hoga aur saara blame tum par aayega, tumhe andar hi andar ghutan de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Bohot darr lagta hai. Padosi aur rishtedar kya kahenge agar meri shadi mein problem aayi? Divorce stigma ka naam sunte hi parents ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Isiliye main hamesha chup rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To provide a short, supportive response to the stigma cue without pushing for details, using Lens D.
text: In saari baaton ke chalte tumne ek lambe samay se apne sach ko khud tak hi daba kar rakha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Aadat pad chuki hai ab toh bojh uthane ki. Par kabhi kabhi raat ko akelepan mein bohot rona aata hai. Aisa lagta hai ki kya meri apni koi identity bachi hi nahi hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To deepen exploration by asking an open-ended question based on her expression of loss of identity.
text: Jab yeh ghutan bahut zyada badh jati hai aur tum apni identity dhoondhne lagti ho, tab apne us akelepan ke waqt ko kaise handle karti ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Handle kya karungi, kabhi kabhi lagta hai ki bas sab khatam kar dun... aisi life ka kya fayda jahan main apne hi ghar mein mehmaan jaisi hoon. Par phir maa ki aakhiri umeed yaad aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To acknowledge the moderate risk with warmth and check safety while mirroring the duty aspect using Lens B.
text: Ghar walon ko neechu dekhne se bachane ka farz tumhe in aakhiri aur mushkil khayalon se wapas kheenchtata hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unki khushi ke liye maine apne saare sapne ek kone mein rakh diye hain
text: Haan main abhi totally safe hoon, wo bas extreme moments mein hopelessness aati hai. Main apne parents ko rulate hue nahi dekh sakti. Isliye unki khushi ke liye maine apne saare sapne ek kone mein rakh diye hain. Par khud pe gussa aur sharam dono aate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To name the unexpressed feeling of isolation that comes from preserving the relationship at the cost of her identity.
text: Lagta hai ki is bahu aur beti ke role ko perfect rakhne ki koshish aur apne sapne mitane ki wajah se tumne khud ko ek gehre isolation aur akelepan mein daal diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Ekdum isolated hoon main. Mera friends ke sath milna bhi ab band ho gaya hai. Sab chhoot gaya peeche. Aur sasural mein sabko lagta hai ki main egoistic hoon kyunki main office jati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate her feelings as normal within the cultural expectations of a daughter-in-law, separating her worth from the stigma.
text: Beti aur bahu ke is dohre dabaav mein tumhe akela aur misunderstood mehsoos karna humare samaj mein bilkul natural hai, par unke in taanon ka tumhari mehnat ya sachai se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Main bhi janti hoon main kitni capable hoon. Mere office mein meri bohot respect hai. Par ghar me aate hi main zero ho jati hoon. Yeh double life ji kar bohot sharam aati hai, jaise main ek fraud hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To share a systemic anecdote relevant to working women managing family honor, without offering a solution.
text: Ek aurat ki zindagi mein office ka samman aur ghar aate hi in expectations ke beech zero feel karna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein sanskar aur izzat ka bojh sabse bhaari hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Wahi izzat ka bojh mujhe roz maar raha hai. Ab toh meri neend bhi proper nahi aati aur office ka kaam affect ho raha hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... main is sab mein balance kaise rakhun? Koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To offer two small, actionable choices to help her preserve her identity without disrupting family dynamics.
text: Aise mein jab itna sab akele face kar rahi ho, do chhote kadam try kar sakti ho. Pehla, ghar mein enter karne se pehle 2 minute society park mein baith kar apni professional identity ko acknowledge karna. Dusra, apne phone mein ek private folder banana jahan din ki ek aisi cheez likho jispe tumhe pride feel hua. Inme se kya doable lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Society park wala option theek nahi kyunki ghar walon ki nazar rehti hai. Par main private notes easily apne phone mein likh sakti hoon, password laga kar. Wahan meri achievements secretly safe rahengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To walk her through the chosen digital journal step clearly.
text: Apne mann ki thodi shanti ke liye pehle yeh karo… roj raat sone se pehle us app mein apne office ka koi ek chhota accomplishment likho… phir phone lock kardo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan yeh daily note maintain karna totally possible hai. Kam se kam main bhulungi nahi ki meri koi value hai. Par ghar pe sasural walon ke samne apna ye sanskar wala roop maintain karte hue over-exhaustion ka kya karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reframe her exhaustion as a result of systemic pressure rather than individual failure.
text: Humare samaj ki sachayi yeh hai ki ek bahu ko humesha doosron ki umeedon par khara utarne ke liye force kiya jata hai, aur is pressure ki wajah se aane wali thakan tumhari weakness nahi balki ek structural burden ka nateeja hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unki khushi ke liye maine apne saare sapne ek kone mein rakh diye hain
text: Bohot deeply samajh aa rahi hai mujhe yeh baat ab. Pehle main khud ko hi kosti thi. Tabhi toh unki khushi ke liye maine apne saare sapne ek kone mein rakh diye hain, bina realise kiye ki problem society ke is rule mein hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the timeline of her past self-blame shifting to systemic understanding using Lens D.
text: Thoda waqt nikal kar yeh realise karne ke baad ki tum pichle kayi saalon se system ka diya bojh khud par daal rahi thi, tumhe us self-blame se shayad thodi mukti mil rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Definitely. It is quite relieving to realize that I don't have to carry the shame of being 'selfish' anymore. I am fulfilling my duties quietly, aur mera career bhi meri hard work ka result hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate her ability to recognize her worth within her difficult circumstances.
text: Tumhara apne limits ko samajhna aur ghar tatha office dono jagah ki mehnat ko ek sath value de paana tumhari bohot badi taqat hai, aur is sachayi ko internalize karna kaafi himmat wali baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Himmat jutaani padegi. Main unse abhi kisi bhi baat par lad nahi sakti, divorce stigma aur parents ki izzat sabse badi hai mere liye. Par mentally khud ki pehchaan ko protect zaroor karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror her realistic approach to relational safety while focusing on internal protection using Lens C.
text: Khud ko thoda space dena us parivaarik reality ke andar jahan abhi unke against jana safe nahi hai, tumhe kam se kam apne liye ek majboot internal boundary banane mein madad kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Ek solid inner space banana is definitely my primary focus right now. I will focus on my daily notes and validate my own worth instead of seeking it from the family.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect the quiet hope and relief emerging from her new focus.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki apne aap ko openly express kiye bina validate karne ka yeh safe raasta dhoondh kar, tumhare andar ek gehari shanti aur ummeed jaag rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unki khushi ke liye maine apne saare sapne ek kone mein rakh diye hain
text: Ummeed toh aayi hai thodi, par darwaaze ke bahar jab festival aayega ya rishtedar milenge, toh ye dar phir aayega. Tab shayad unki khushi ke liye maine apne saare sapne ek kone mein rakh diye hain, wapas real feel hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the feared consequence of future social pressures threatening her identity again using Lens E.
text: Jab relatives aur samaj ka wo direct pressure aayega, tab yeh darr ki tumhe dobara apna wajood unke taanon ke aage puri tarah chupana pad jayega, tumhare andar fir se ghabrahat bhar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, future ka bojh hamesha se scary raha hai kyunki bahu role mein unki demands toh kabhi khatam nahi hotin. Par abhi main itna aage ka soch kar panic nahi hona chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To prompt her to think about how she will use her new strategy during future moments of panic.
text: In festivals aur gatherings ke dauran jab yeh darr tumhe achanak se overtake karne lagega, tab aaj decide kiye gaye un private notes ka sahara tum us bheed mein kaise logi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Main room mein akele aa kar phone kholungi aur yaad dilaungi khud ko ki main spiritually abhi zinda hoon. I have a professional life, and I matter. That will be my secret escape.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate her secret escape strategy as a strong, protective mechanism in her context.
text: Yeh chhoti si strategy us bheed wale pressure ke beech khud ko apne asli wajood se jode rakhne ka ek behad asardar tareeqa hai, jise koi tumse chheen nahi sakta.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Koi chheen nahi sakta, sach mein. Main bahar se duty karti rahungi unka maan rakhne ke liye, par andar se meri self-respect maintain rahegi. It feels so much lighter to know this.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the relational reality where she maintains external duty while securing her internal peace using Lens B.
text: Dusron ko directly counter na karke bahar se ek obedient bahu ka role poora karte rehna, par andar hi andar apne aap ko bacha lena, tumhe ab ek halkapan de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Lighter and practical. Main is reality ko jaldi change nahi kar sakti, but I don't have to carry the shame. Thank you for making me see my own worth today.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To close with a supportive systemic reframe affirming that her dual reality doesn't diminish her personal journey.
text: Apne khwaabon ko thodi jagah dena aur sharam ke bojh ko bahari pressure samajh kar accept karna, aage chalkar tumhe khud ke aur zyada kareeb layega; tumhara yeh safar sach mein qabil-e-tareef hai.
